parameters.query: SELECT discord_id FROM pipemind.roster WHERE active = true AND role = 'client';

SELECT (
  (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM pipemind.approval_drafts
     WHERE feature_tag = 'F-02' AND status = 'pending' AND expires_at > now())
  +
  (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM pipemind.teammate_queries
     WHERE status = 'pending' AND deadline_at > now())
) AS pending_count;
SELECT discord_id FROM pipemind.roster WHERE active = true AND role = 'team_lead' ORDER BY name ASC LIMIT 1;

nodes.name: Notify TL — Too Many Pending QA

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ content: '[Pipemind] A new client question came in, but there are already 2 or more Q&A drafts pending your approval. I could not queue a new draft. Please review the pending drafts in this channel so the backlog clears and I can answer the client.' }) }}

parameters.query:
SELECT d.discord_id, d.calendar_email, d.clockify_user_id, (d.discord_id IS NOT NULL) AS found
FROM (SELECT 1 AS x) AS dummy
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT r.discord_id, r.calendar_email, r.clockify_user_id
  FROM pipemind.standup_records sr
  JOIN pipemind.roster r ON r.discord_id = sr.discord_id
  WHERE sr.feature_area = $1
    AND r.active = TRUE AND r.role = 'developer' AND r.muted = FALSE
  ORDER BY sr.standup_date DESC, sr.ingested_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
) d ON true;

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ timeMin: new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10) + 'T00:00:00Z', timeMax: new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10) + 'T23:59:59Z', items: $('Find Candidate Developer').first().json.calendar_email ? [{ id: $('Find Candidate Developer').first().json.calendar_email }] : [] }) }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO pipemind.teammate_queries
  (client_question, client_channel_id, feature_area, asked_discord_id, asked_dm_channel_id, deadline_at)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6)
RETURNING query_id;

options.queryReplacement:
={{ [
  $('Assemble Context').first().json.client_question,
  $('Filter Message').first().json.channel_id,
  $('Identify Feature Area').first().json.feature_area,
  $('Find Candidate Developer').first().json.discord_id,
  $('Compose Teammate Query DM').first().json.dm_channel_id,
  $('Compose Teammate Query DM').first().json.deadline_iso
] }}

parameters.query: UPDATE pipemind.teammate_queries SET status = 'timed_out' WHERE query_id = $1::uuid AND status = 'pending';

main.node: Notify TL — Too Many Pending QA
